name: admin_triage_bug_reports_screenshot
_note: Seeded bug_report ...007 has screenshot_path = NULL, so BOTH backends return 400 { error: 'no screenshot for this report', code: 'invalid-input', request_id }. The image/png streaming path is NOT exercised here on purpose: screenshots are served from the container filesystem (bug_reports.screenshot_path is a disk path, not a bytea column), and augment.sql (SQL only) cannot provision a file on both shadow containers' disks. Even if screenshot_path were set, both backends hit fs.access/os.Open failure and return 400 'screenshot file missing on disk'. The deterministic 400 (full body, request_id ignored) is the strongest parity assertion authorable in the SQL-only shadow harness.
